message:
test(atc): comprehensive edge case coverage — 29 new tests, 147 total

Adds edge case and boundary condition tests across all ATC subsystems:

DecisionCore: partial likelihoods, 2-action runner-up, uniform posterior,
  alpha clamping, empty likelihoods
EvidenceLedger: all() ordering, latest_id empty, format_message empty
  posterior, capacity=1
AgentRhythm: out-of-order timestamps, same timestamp, Dead agent skip,
  unregistered agent ignored
Martingale: no-drift sources, CUSUM ordering, dual-alert calibration,
  edge coverage targets, zero-capacity regret
SessionSummary: MessageReceived absorb, timestamp-0
LoadRouter: empty map, zero interval, negative PID error, zero dt
Advanced: 3-participant VCG, binary entropy, Little's Law zero-arrival,
  deterministic Kingman

Also fixes rank_probe_targets test: use asymmetric likelihoods to
actually push posterior toward uncertainty (uniform likelihoods don't
change relative proportions after normalization).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
